en:
In order to test this new state of affairs the father showed her pictures illustrating volcanoes and earthquake devastations. Anna remained unaffected, she examined the pictures with indifference, remarking, "These people are dead; I have already seen that quite often." The picture of a volcanic eruption no longer had any attraction for her. Thus all her scientific interest collapsed and vanished as suddenly as it came. During the days following the explanation Anna had quite important matters to occupy herself with; she disseminated her newly acquired knowledge among those about her in the following manner: She began by again circumstantially affirming what had been told her, viz. that Freddy, her younger sister, and herself had grown in her mother, that papa and mama grew in their mothers, and that the servants likewise grew in their respective mothers. By frequent questions she tested the true basis of her knowledge, for her suspicion was aroused in no small measure, so that it needed many confirmations to remove all her uncertainties.

On one occasion the trustworthiness of the theory threatened to go to pieces. About a week after the explanation, the father was taken ill with influenza and had to remain in bed during the forenoon. The children knew nothing about this, and Anna, coming into the parents' bedroom, saw what was quite unusual, namely, that her father was remaining in bed. She again took on a peculiar surprised expression; she remained at a distance from the bed and would not come nearer; she was apparently again reserved and suspicious. But suddenly she burst out with the question, "Why are you in bed; have you a plant in your inside too?"

The father naturally had to laugh. He calmed her, however, by assuring her that children never grow in the father, that only women can have children, and not men; thereupon the child again became friendly. But though the surface was calm the problems continued to work in the dark. A few days later, while at dinner, Anna related the following dream: "I dreamed last night of Noah's ark." The father then asked her what she had dreamed about it, but Anna's answer was sheer nonsense. In such cases it is necessary only to wait and pay attention. A few minutes later she said to her mother, "I dreamed last night about Noah's ark, and there were a lot of little animals in it." Another pause. She then began her story for the third time. " I dreamed last night about Noah's ark, and there were a lot of baby animals in it, and underneath there was a lid and that opened and all the baby animals fell out. "

The children really had a Noah's ark, but its opening, a lid, was on the roof and not underneath. In this way she delicately intimated that the story of the birth from mouth or breast is incorrect, and that she had some inkling where the children came out.
zh:
為了測試這個新事態，父親向她展示了描繪火山與地震災難的圖片。安娜無動於衷，她冷漠地檢視這些圖片，評論道：「這些人都死了；我已經看過很多次了。」一幅火山爆發的圖片對她不再有任何吸引力。於是，她所有的科學興趣就像來時一樣突然地崩潰並消失了。在解釋之後的幾天裡，安娜忙於處理一些相當重要的事情；她以下列方式將新獲得的知識傳播給身邊的人：她開始再次詳細地確認被告知的事實，即她的妹妹弗萊迪和她自己是在母親體內長大的，爸爸和媽媽是在他們的母親體內長大的，而僕人們也同樣是在各自母親體內長大的。透過頻繁的提問，她測試了自己知識的真實基礎，因為她的懷疑被大大地激發了，以至於需要許多確認才能消除她所有的不確定性。

有一次，這個理論的可信度差點崩潰。大約在解釋後一週，父親因流感生病，必須在上午臥床休息。孩子們對此一無所知，安娜走進父母的臥室，看到了一件很不尋常的事，那就是她的父親還躺在床上。她又露出了那種奇特的驚訝表情；她與床保持距離，不願靠近；她顯然再次變得保留和懷疑。但突然間，她爆發出了問題：「你為什麼躺在床上？你肚子裡也有一棵植物嗎？」

父親自然得笑了。不過，他安撫了她，向她保證孩子永遠不會在父親體內生長，只有女人才能生孩子，男人不行；於是孩子又變得友善了。但儘管表面平靜，問題仍在暗中運作。幾天後，在晚餐時，安娜講述了以下夢境：「我昨晚夢見了挪亞方舟。」父親隨後問她夢見了什麼，但安娜的回答完全是胡言亂語。在這種情況下，只需要等待並留意。幾分鐘後，她對母親說：「我昨晚夢見了挪亞方舟，裡面有很多小動物。」又停頓了一下。然後她第三次開始講述她的故事。「我昨晚夢見了挪亞方舟，裡面有很多小動物，下面有一個蓋子，那個蓋子打開了，所有的小動物都掉了出來。」

孩子們確實有一個挪亞方舟玩具，但它的開口，一個蓋子，是在屋頂上，而不是在下面。透過這種方式，她巧妙地暗示了從嘴巴或胸部出生的故事是不正確的，並且她對孩子從哪裡出來有了一些線索。
